initiatives.name: Athens Community Farm
initiatives.description: We are a community supported micro farm in the heart of the Village of Athens, New York that grows and distributes fruits, vegetables, and herbs.

initiatives.name: Sweet Freedom Farm
initiatives.description: Black-led farm that grows culturally relevant, nutrient dense foods for communities impacted by food apartheid and the prison industrial complex.

initiatives.name: Hudson Catskill Housing
initiatives.description: A Black-led initiative providing community resources focused on housing & racial justice in Hudson, Catskill, Albany & beyond.
